message:
fix(tui): improve logout alias handling and add login/pending-input tests

Refine /logout to remove credentials stored under both canonical and
alias provider names (e.g. both "google" and "gemini"), preventing
orphaned keys when the user logged in under one name variant but logs
out under another. Also replace map_or(false, ...) with is_some_and()
for idiomatic Clippy conformance in FrameTimingStats::new().

Add integration tests for:
- PendingInput::System message rendering (verifies system messages
  display without triggering "Processing..." state)
- /login google and /login gemini alias both showing Google API key
  guidance with correct ai.google.dev URL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
